situation: _mcp_call default request_id=1 caused every JSON-RPC call (initialize, tools/list, tools/call) to share the same id. Retries and multi-phase handshakes could mismatch responses on the server side; JSON-RPC spec requires unique ids per in-flight request.
action: Add module-level itertools.count(1) generator (_REQUEST_ID_COUNTER). Change _mcp_call signature from request_id=1 to request_id=None with auto-increment via next(_REQUEST_ID_COUNTER); explicit id still allowed for test/replay. Single-file change, no public-interface touch → route-fix.
outcome_evidence: python3 -c 'import ast; ast.parse(...)' returned syntax-ok; opt-worktree.sh committed and pushed to origin/auto/opt-devix-dingtalk-skill-1783153053 (new branch, track set). Diff isolated to single file, no main mutation.
next_suggestion: Derive M02 fix next (devix-dingtalk-skill _save_config non-atomic write → tempfile+os.replace). After M02, continue with L01/L02/I01 in priority order.
